Returns the position of the first mouse click during an area operation.

If no snapshot has been published yet this method will fall back to returning the current Grid.toString() value.

getMaterial() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.grid.Cell
 
getMinGrowthValueToFight() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.grid.Cell
 
getMode() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.UiState
 
getOpacity() - Method in interface com.example.simul2d.Entities.Displayable
 
getOpacity() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.Mold
 
getPos() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.grid.Cell
Returns the cell's Vec2 position.
getPropagationDistributionList() - Method in interface com.example.simul2d.Entities.CanPropagate
The list is typically ordered from highest to lowest weight and is used by propagation systems to select a target cell.
getPropagationDistributionList() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.AxialMold
The returned list is the static, unmodifiable list of weighted axial targets shared across all instances.
getPropagationDistributionList() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.AxialMold1
Returns the shared axial propagation distribution.
getPropagationDistributionList() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.CircularMold
The returned list is the static, unmodifiable list of weighted circular targets shared across all instances.
getPropagationDistributionList() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.DividedMold1
The returned list is the static, unmodifiable list of weighted proximal targets shared across all instances.
getPropagationDistributionList() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.ProximalMold
The list is static and shared across all instances of proximal molds.
getPropagationProbability() - Method in interface com.example.simul2d.Entities.CanPropagate
 
getPropagationProbability() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.Mold
 
getPublishedState() - Static method in class com.example.simul2d.Console.ConsoleMain

Returns the currently selected entity type.
getSelectedMaterial() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.UiState
Returns the currently selected material.
getSpeed() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Core.SimulationState
 
getTime() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Core.SimulationState
 
getTotalGrowthOnCell() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.grid.Cell
Returns the aggregated growth across all CanGrow entities in this cell.
getUpdateSimulationSystem() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Core.SimulationLoop
 
getVulnerability() - Method in enum class com.example.simul2d.grid.Material
the vulnerability factor used by propagation calculations.
getWeight() - Method in record class com.example.simul2d.Entities.CoorWeight
 
getWidth() - Method in class com.example.simul2d.grid.Grid
Returns the width of the grid (number of columns).
GOODSTUFF - Enum constant in enum class com.example.simul2d.grid.Material
 
GraphController - Class in com.example.simul2d.JavaFX
Controller for the population and infected LineCharts in the UI.
GraphController() - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.GraphController
 
graphStep(double, Map<Entities, Integer>, Map<Entities, Integer>) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.GraphController
Called each time the simulation produces new aggregate values for the graphs.
graphStep(double, Map<Entities, Integer>, Map<Entities, Integer>) - Method in interface com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.NeedsGraphValues
Called periodically by the simulation to provide values to be plotted.
Grid - Class in com.example.simul2d.grid
Represents a 2D grid composed of cells for a simulation.
Grid(int, int) - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.grid.Grid
Constructs a non-toric Grid with the specified dimensions.
Grid(int, int, boolean) - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.grid.Grid
Constructs a new Grid with the specified dimensions and toric behavior.
GridController - Class in com.example.simul2d.JavaFX
Controller that renders the simulation grid as a grid of rectangles and forwards mouse actions to the input command queue according to the currently selected `UiState` tool.
GridController() - Constructor for class com.example.simul2d.JavaFX.GridController
 
grow(int) - Method in interface com.example.simul2d.Entities.CanGrow
Apply one growth step to the implementing object.
grow(int) - Method in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.Mold
Default per-step growth implementation.
growth - Variable in class com.example.simul2d.Entities.Entity
